bot.interface.errors.Active_Command_Cool: This command is currently under a cooldown. Please try again <t:{time}:R>
bot.interface.errors.Collector_Timeout_D: The interaction collector for this message has timed out. Please try again and select an option within {time}.
bot.interface.errors.Failed_To_Fetch_Sea: An unexpected error occurred while accessing the Sea Of Thieves API. Please try again later.
Failed To Fetch Sea Of Thieves
bot.interface.errors.Invalid_Autocomplet: The provided value for the {option_name} option is not valid. Please try again and select an autocompleted option.
bot.interface.errors.Invalid_Profile_Fil: The provided attachment does not meet the requirements for a profile picture or banner. Please try again with a different file.
bot.interface.errors.Locked_Interaction_: This interaction collector has an specific filter present which prevents use from unknown users.
bot.interface.errors.Missing_Cast_Progre: No progress using {command_markdown} during the provided timeframe could be found. Please try again with a different timeframe.
bot.interface.errors.Missing_Interaction: The handler associated with this interaction could not be found. Please contact a developer for further assistance.
bot.interface.errors.Missing_Xbox_Connec: This action requires an active [oAuth2]({auth_url}) connection to an Xbox account. Please link your account and try again later.
bot.interface.errors.Restricted_Profile_: This profile is private and only accessible by limited number of people. Please try again later.
bot.interface.errors.Unexpected_Server_E: An unexpected internal server occurred while trying to process this request. Please try again later.
bot.interface.errors.Unknown_User_Connec: The requested user has not connected their accounts to Mercia's Quill. Please try again later.
bot.interface.errors.Unknown_Wiki_Page_D: The queried wiki page could not be found. Please try again later.
